sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99427" key="sunapo/lausis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συναπό-λαυσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n99427.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">joint enjoyment</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2018.tlg001:4:23" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eus.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PE</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.23</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
